glosses.es: bola de masa; nudo en la garganta
glosses.fr: boulette de pâte; boule dans la gorge
glosses.pt: bolinho de massa; nó na garganta
glosses.vi: bánh bột viên; cục nghẹn ở cổ
glosses.hi: आटे की गोली; गले में गाँठ

translations.en: I’ll order a dumpling with it.
translations.es: Voy a pedir una bolita de masa para acompañar.
translations.fr: Je vais commander une quenelle avec ça.
translations.vi: Tôi gọi thêm một viên bánh.
translations.nl: Ik bestel er een knoedel bij.
translations.hi: मैं इसके साथ एक डंपलिंग ऑर्डर करूँगा.
translations.nb: Jeg bestiller en knødel ved siden av.
translations.id: Aku akan pesan satu dumpling untuk tambahan.
translations.ja: それに団子を一つ頼むね。

tokens.explanation: 1st person singular nominative personal pronoun; subject of the clause.
Main verb; 1st person singular present indicative of 'bestellen'.
Indefinite article inflected for accusative masculine singular; determiner of the direct object.
Masculine noun; accusative singular; direct object of 'bestelle'.
Pronominal adverb modifying the verb; means 'in addition/along with that'.

sentences.target: Der Kloß schwimmt in der Soße.

translations.de: Der Kloß schwimmt in der Soße.
translations.en: The dumpling is floating in the sauce.
translations.es: La bolita de masa flota en la salsa.
translations.fr: La quenelle flotte dans la sauce.
translations.pt: O bolinho está boiando no molho.
translations.vi: Viên bánh nổi trong nước sốt.
translations.nl: De knoedel drijft in de saus.
translations.hi: डंपलिंग सॉस में तैर रहा है.
translations.ja: 団子がソースに浮かんでいる。

tokens.explanation: Definite article; nominative masculine singular; marks the subject noun.
Masculine noun; nominative singular; subject of 'schwimmt'.
Intransitive main verb; 3rd person singular present indicative of 'schwimmen'.
Preposition; here indicates location and governs the dative case.
Definite article; dative feminine singular after 'in' (static location).
Feminine noun; dative singular; complement of the preposition 'in'.

sentences.target: Ich habe einen Kloß im Hals.

translations.de: Ich habe einen Kloß im Hals.
translations.en: I have a lump in my throat.
translations.es: Tengo un nudo en la garganta.
translations.fr: J’ai une boule dans la gorge.
translations.yue: 我喉嚨好似塞住咗一嚿嘢。
translations.pt: Estou com um nó na garganta.
translations.nl: Ik heb een brok in mijn keel.
translations.hi: मेरे गले में गाँठ सी है.
translations.nb: Jeg har en klump i halsen.
translations.id: Aku merasa ada ganjalan di tenggorokan.
translations.sv: Jag har en klump i halsen.
translations.da: Jeg har en klump i halsen.

tokens.explanation: 1st person singular nominative personal pronoun; subject of the clause.
Main verb (not auxiliary here); 1st person singular present indicative; expresses possession.
Indefinite article; accusative masculine singular; determiner of the direct object.
Masculine noun; accusative singular; direct object of 'habe'.
Prepositional contraction of 'in' + 'dem'; introduces a locative PP; governs dative.
Masculine noun; dative singular as object of 'im'; body part in the PP 'im Hals'.

sentences.target: Mama formt einen Kloß aus Kartoffelteig.

translations.de: Mama formt einen Kloß aus Kartoffelteig.
translations.en: Mom shapes a dumpling from potato dough.
translations.es: Mamá da forma a una bolita de masa de patata.
translations.fr: Maman façonne une quenelle avec une pâte de pommes de terre.
translations.it: La mamma modella uno gnocco con impasto di patate.
translations.ko: 엄마가 감자 반죽으로 만두를 빚고 있어요.
translations.zh-Hans: 妈妈用土豆面团捏了一个丸子。
translations.yue: 媽媽用薯仔麵糰搓個糰。
translations.ru: Мама лепит кнедлик из картофельного теста.
translations.pt: A mãe modela um bolinho de massa de batata.
translations.he: אמא מעצבת כופתא מבצק תפוחי אדמה.
translations.tr: Annem patates hamurundan bir hamur köftesi şekillendiriyor.
translations.vi: Mẹ nặn một viên bánh từ bột khoai tây.
translations.ar: الأم تشكّل كرة عجين من عجينة البطاطا.
translations.nl: Mama vormt een knoedel van aardappeldeeg.
translations.uk: Мама ліпить кнедлик із картопляного тіста.
translations.hi: माँ आलू के आटे से एक डंपलिंग बना रही है.
translations.pl: Mama formuje kluskę z ciasta ziemniaczanego.
translations.el: Η μαμά πλάθει ένα ντάμπλινγκ από ζύμη πατάτας.
translations.nb: Mamma former en knødel av potetdeig.
translations.id: Mama membentuk satu dumpling dari adonan kentang.
translations.sv: Mamma formar en knödel av potatisdeg.
translations.ro: Mama modelează o gălușcă din aluat de cartofi.
translations.cs: Máma tvapyє knedlík z bramborového těsta.
translations.da: Mor former en knödel af kartoffeldej.
translations.ja: 母さんがじゃがいも生地で団子を作っている。

tokens.explanation: Common kinship noun; nominative singular; subject of the clause.
Transitive main verb; 3rd person singular present indicative of 'formen'.
Indefinite article; accusative masculine singular; determiner of the direct object.
Masculine noun; accusative singular; direct object of 'formt'.
Preposition; indicates material/source; governs dative.
Masculine compound noun ('Kartoffel' + 'Teig'); dative singular; complement of 'aus'.
